title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ABB India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
